title: lobelia gilletii
intro: Lobelia gilletii, also known as the Gatineau lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in compounds like lobeline, which has been shown to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Lobelia gilletii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to relieve respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
